item.title: 37 and ten months of HRT
item.description: Left, two weeks into HRT thinking I’m too old. Right, ten months HRT after going to a wedding as myself. A year ago, for pride, I made a post on here; admitting to myself and the world that I needed to transition. I was so full of fear. I’ve got a long way to go but for the first time I feel the progress. Thank you to all those that helped me get here, the Imgur community is full of wonderful individuals who talked to me throughout the doubt and depression that the process brings. It wasn’t easy and I wouldn’t be here without any of you. I acknowledge all your hard work even if we don’t talk anymore. Thank you. If this gets downvoted because it’s a selfie, fine. I do hope those individuals who helped me see this. Thank you.
item.dc:creator: EmmAhGerd

item.title: Dance, singing, music dump
item.dc:creator: QueueTee

item.title: She's back, baby! We almost lost her :')
item.description: https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/voyager-1-is-back-nasa-spacecraft-safely-resumes-all-science-observations/ TLDR from what I understand is that something went wrong with a chip and Voyager stopped communicating with NASA back in November. They were able to figure out which chip was the problem and move the code, piece by piece, to other chips on the craft. They still have to fool around with getting everything synchronized but the instruments are functioning so it looks like it's gonna be ok. This is not my area of expertise so pls chime in if I just explained that completely fucking wrong. What's for sure tho is that it's so impressive! It takes over 20 hours for any signals to go between us and the craft. I can't imagine the patience and diligence it takes to solve a problem on a craft you can't see or touch, and you can only talk (or listen) to it once a day. But seriously. This tough old broad was launched in 1977 and expected to last 5 years. Now it's the farthest man-made object out in space. It almost died but it's coming back to life. LONG LIVE THE QUEEN
item.dc:creator: finesherbes

item.title: so my boy Baki wanted to join my Ada Wong "photoshoot"...
item.description: I was in my room taking pics of my Ada cosplay and this BIG fluffball was being unusually needy :D (he doesn't always want attention but when he does... he makes DAMN SURE he gets it!!)

item.title: Not even once
item.description:
This is a perfect slap in the face.
You know who else is known for keeping morbid trophies and making art with human remains? Serial killers. that's who.

item.title: I genuinely miss video stores. Sometimes you would find movies you never heard of, read the back and rent it. I discovered so many good ones. So many films never made it past VHS too.

item.title: If you make a nostril sound, you have to hit the green arrow thingy. BLESSED SUNDAY MEME DUMP
item.description:
1. Sound ON
2
3. DRAKE = FAKE
4
5. JIRAFFSIC PARK, I tried...
6
7
8. Thanksgiving dinner
9
10
11
12
13. Seriously IMGUR what will you do with 500 million if you won them tomorrow?
14. Best not read about it...
15. Thanks for getting to the end of the dump, hope this dump made your nostril move at least once! I’m happy to share that I've been working on my dream game for the past year and a half, and it’s almost here! "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure that my brother and I have poured our hearts into. Your support means the world to us! Adding our game to your wishlist helps us reach more gamers and keeps you updated on the release. Thank you for helping us make this dream come true. Let's save the multiverse together! https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
